title: Graphic and Video Designer
description:
We are looking for a creative, talented individual to join our Marketing Team as a Graphic and Videographic Designer.

You will play a crucial role in brainstorming, storyboarding, designing, and creating service marketing and branding materials that are effective and engaging in their totality.

You will be responsible for the print & online experience on our website, ecommerce marketplaces and social media.

This role calls for a talented all-rounder with initiative and drive, along with a skill set that includes Video Producing/Editing and most importantly, Graphic Design skills.

You must have excellent creative, communication and presentation skills, with the ability to create, plan and prioritise, multi-task, and being adaptable.

A positive, problem-solving attitude, enthusiasm, and the ability to drive creativity and top of the range visual content are all essential for this role.


REQUIREMENTS

1. At least a Diploma in Digital design or Multimedia Design.

2. Minimum 2-3 years experience working in Multimedia/Digital Design, Post-production House, Creatives Agencies, or in-house creative departments.

3. High technical proficiency and expertise in Adobe Creative suite programs (particularly Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, After Effects)

4. Excellent knowledge of storyboarding, visual design principals, and animation.

5. Passionate about new trends in digital and social media and understanding of all major localised social media and ecommerce platforms’ (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube. Amazon, Shopee, Lazada) dimensions and specifications, consumer behaviour, etc

6. Ability to manage and handle urgent last-minute creative requests. You will be in a demanding and fast-paced environment. There will be multiple projects with tight deadlines

7. Artistic with a keen eye for aesthetics and visually appealing content.

8. Self-motivated and resourceful in making the impossible possible.

9. Good communication and interpersonal skills

10. Relevant skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript and is social media savvy and programming skills are a plus

11. Passionate about work with strong interest in music industry

postedCompany.description: Believer Music is the leading executive music training centre in Singapore. Featuring state-of-the-art, hi-tech studios islandwide with a 3,800 weekly capacity enrollment, we provide learners with the optimal training conditions for a truly genuine learning opportunity. Experience consistent, solid musical instruction that will not only take you higher, but also deeper to where you‘ve ever gone before. 24 years and growing with more than 30,000 members, Believer Music continues to transform and impact thousands with the power of music.
postedCompany.name: BELIEVER MUSIC PTE. LTD.
